summary: Phase 2 CC Analytics Endpoints: All 29 backend tests passed (100%). Verified 4 new CC analytics features: Due Calendar, Interest Calculator, Rewards Tracker, and AI Card Recommender (uses LIVE GPT-4o).

frontend_issues.notes: Frontend testing skipped per request (React Native Expo app)

critical_code_review_comments: All 4 CC analytics endpoints implemented correctly with proper authentication
Due Calendar returns calendar array sorted by days_until_due with urgency levels (critical/warning/upcoming/normal)
Interest Calculator calculates total interest for minimum payment scenario with schedule (capped at 24 months in response)
Rewards Tracker returns total_points, total_rupee_value, per-card breakdown with categories and 6-month trend
Card Recommender returns ranked recommendations with AI recommendation text using LIVE GPT-4o
All endpoints return 401 for unauthenticated requests (verified)
Card IDs consistent across all endpoints

success_rate.frontend: Not tested (React Native app - per request)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing demo user with 3 HDFC Regalia credit cards
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 CC Analytics fully tested. All 4 endpoints working: Due Calendar (smart reminders, urgency), Interest Calculator (min payment scenario with card-specific rates), Rewards Tracker (points/value/categories/trend), Card Recommender (AI-powered via GPT-4o). Demo user has 3 HDFC Regalia cards with transactions.

response_structure.calendar: Array of cards sorted by days_until_due
response_structure.entry_fields: card_id, card_name, issuer, last_four, due_day, billing_day, next_due_date, days_until_due, outstanding, minimum_due, reminders, urgency

response_structure.summary: original_amount, total_interest, total_paid, months_to_clear, interest_pct_of_principal, monthly_rate
response_structure.schedule: Array of monthly entries (up to 24 months)

/api/credit-cards/interest-calculator PO.edge_cases_tested: Zero outstanding returns error, card_id uses card-specific rate, custom rate accepted

response_structure.total_rupee_value: Sum of all card rupee values
response_structure.cards: Array with card_id, card_name, total_spend, reward_points, rupee_value, point_value, benefits, categories, monthly_trend

Authentication.note: All 4 endpoints return 401 for unauthenticated requests

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are live including Card Recommender (GPT-4o via Emergent LLM Key)
